scripts.start:all: npm run start:adblock && npm run start:homeassistant && npm run start:plex && npm run start:infra
scripts.stop:all: npm run stop:adblock && npm run stop:homeassistant && npm run stop:plex && npm run stop:infra
scripts.start:adblock: cd adblock-stack && docker compose up -d && cd ..
scripts.stop:adblock: cd adblock-stack && docker compose down && cd ..
scripts.logs:adblock: cd adblock-stack && docker compose logs -f && cd ..
scripts.start:homeassistant: cd homeassistant-stack && docker compose up -d && cd ..
scripts.stop:homeassistant: cd homeassistant-stack && docker compose down && cd ..
scripts.logs:homeassistant: cd homeassistant-stack && docker compose logs -f && cd ..
scripts.start:plex: cd plex-stack && docker compose up -d && cd ..
scripts.start:plex:usenet: cd plex-stack && docker compose --profile usenet up -d && cd ..
scripts.stop:plex: cd plex-stack && docker compose down && cd ..
scripts.logs:plex: cd plex-stack && docker compose logs -f && cd ..
scripts.logs:plex:sonarr: cd plex-stack && docker compose logs -f sonarr && cd ..
scripts.logs:plex:radarr: cd plex-stack && docker compose logs -f radarr && cd ..
scripts.logs:plex:qbittorrent: cd plex-stack && docker compose logs -f qbittorrent && cd ..
scripts.start:infra: cd infra-stack && docker compose up -d && cd ..
scripts.stop:infra: cd infra-stack && docker compose down && cd ..
scripts.logs:infra: cd infra-stack && docker compose logs -f && cd ..
scripts.logs:infra:nginx: cd infra-stack && docker compose logs -f nginx && cd ..
scripts.logs:infra:duplicati: cd infra-stack && docker compose logs -f duplicati && cd ..
scripts.start:minecraft: echo 'Usage: npm run start:minecraft -- <server-name>' && echo 'Example: npm run start:minecraft -- server-test'
scripts.start:minecraft:playit: echo 'Usage: npm run start:minecraft:playit -- <server-name>' && echo 'Example: npm run start:minecraft:playit -- server-test'
scripts.stop:minecraft: echo 'Usage: npm run stop:minecraft -- <server-name>' && echo 'Example: npm run stop:minecraft -- server-test'
scripts.logs:minecraft: echo 'Usage: npm run logs:minecraft -- <server-name>' && echo 'Example: npm run logs:minecraft -- server-test'
scripts.setup: echo 'Setup guide:' && echo '1. Copy .env.example to .env in each stack' && echo '2. Fill in required secrets' && echo '3. Create config and data directories' && echo '4. Run: npm run start:all'
